app.name: MathVision
app.tagline: Photograph any math problem — and watch the solution built, step by step.

capture.title: Solve a problem
capture.subtitle: Take a photo, upload, or paste an image
capture.soon: The capture & recognition engine arrives in Phase 1

history.title: History
history.empty: Your saved solutions will appear here
history.signin: Sign in to see your saved solutions.

learn.title: Learn
learn.soon: Practice, an AI tutor, and progress — coming soon

solve.prompt: Type an equation to solve — or tap an example
solve.hint: Linear & quadratic equations are solved and verified right here — no keys needed. Photo capture and AI solving for any problem arrive when API keys are added.

auth.signinPrompt: Sign in to save your solutions and sync them across your devices.

game.noBoard: Solve problems to climb the board!
game.signin: Sign in to track XP, streaks, and achievements.

family.title: Family
